title: Write documentation compiler skill contract
summary: Define documentation-mode instructions for converting accepted feedback into KB edits and `documentation_build` evidence.

goal.outcome: Documentation mode compiles accepted feedback into canonical knowledge changes and a validated `documentation_build`.
acceptance: `codewiki-documentation` skill frontmatter triggers on accepted feedback builds, KB/spec updates, and documentation alignment work.
Instructions state exact actions, tools, KB ownership rules, `codewiki_build kind=documentation` point, validation point, and planning handoff output.
Instructions remove stale migration wording and send task shaping to planning mode.
non_goals: Do not write planning task-shaping guidance beyond handoff requirements.
Do not edit feedback, implementation, or validation loop content except route pointers.
verification: Run scoped `codewiki_audit` for skills and alignment.
Inspect against knowledge and compiler specs.

delta.desired: Documentation mode has exact KB/build/gateway timing and hands executable delta to planning.
delta.current: Documentation loop guidance mixes KB work with migration-era roadmap creation wording.
delta.closure: Documentation skill and tests prevent docs-to-planning drift.
